items.name: Days to Close (bucket)
items.source_formula:
IF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then "Overdue"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then "0-30 days"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then "1-3 months"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then "3-6 months"
ELSE "> 6 months"
END

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation
items.source_formula:
IF      [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5 then "1" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*2 then "2" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*3 then "3" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*4 then "4" 
ELSE "5"                                    
END
items.dax: IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))

items.name: Won/Lost Rate
items.dax: IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Won Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Won Opportunities]) / IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Closed Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Closed Opportunities])

items.name: Dimension
items.source_formula:
CASE [Parameters].[LinPack_093258324044640973] 
WHEN "Account" THEN [Calculation_711568759570489345] 
WHEN "Open Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572205574] 
WHEN "Opportunity Owner" THEN [Calculation_711568759570620418] 
WHEN "Opportunity Stage" THEN [Calculation_711568759572115461] 
WHEN "Opportunity Type" THEN [Opportunity Type] 
WHEN "Won Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572299783] 
END
items.dax: SWITCH("Account", "Account", 'Owned By'[Account], "Open Flag", 'Owned By'[Open Flag], "Opportunity Owner", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner], "Opportunity Stage", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Stage], "Opportunity Type", CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type])), "Won Flag", 'Owned By'[Won Flag])

items.name: Total Sales
items.dax: SUM('Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)])

items.name: Nb of Open Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)
items.dax: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))

items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)
items.dax: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?]))

items.name: Avg Deal Size (won)
items.dax: AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)])

items.name: Sales Velocity
items.dax: (IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Open Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Open Opportunities]) * IF(ISBLANK([Avg Deal Size (won)]), 0, [Avg Deal Size (won)]) * IF(ISBLANK('Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate]), 0, 'Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate])) / IF(ISBLANK([Sales Cycle]), 0, [Sales Cycle])

items.name: Sales Cycle
items.source_formula: AVG(FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))
items.dax: AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))

items.name: Avg Probability
items.dax: AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)])

items.name: Weighted Pipeline Value
items.source_formula: SUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759573139467]*[Amount] END))
items.dax: SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Probability %], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId])*'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))

items.source_formula: [Amount]
items.dax: CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount]))

items.dax: 'Owned By'[Probability %]

items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)

items.name: Pipeline Value
items.source_formula: SUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END))
items.dax: SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), 'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))

items.name: _Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)
items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END)
items.dax: CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)

items.name: Sales Cycle (won)
items.source_formula: AVG(FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))
items.dax: AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))

items.name: Nb of Closed Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)
items.dax: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))

items.name: _Total Sales (Expression)
items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)
items.dax: CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Title
items.source_formula:
IF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "CHAMPIONS"
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "CLOSERS
Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation"
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "HUNTERS/FARMERS
Growth Plan: Closing"
ELSE "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS"
END
items.dax: IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "CHAMPIONS", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "CLOSERS Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "HUNTERS/FARMERS Growth Plan: Closing", "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS")))

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class (sort)
items.source_formula:
IF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN 1
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN 2
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN 3
ELSE 4
END
items.dax: IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], 1, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], 2, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], 3, 4)))

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class
items.source_formula:
IF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]
ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] <=3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]
ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] <=3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]
ELSE [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]
END
items.dax: IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] <= 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] <= 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements])))

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Action
items.source_formula:
CASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]                      THEN "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]   THEN "Guide them on how to generate pipeline."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]              THEN "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]           THEN "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business and to win over clients. Train them quickly." 
END
items.dax: SWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Guide them on how to generate pipeline.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business && to win over clients. Train them quickly.")

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Description
items.source_formula:
CASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]                      THEN "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas and pull the team up."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]   THEN "Effective at closing and winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming or hunting)."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]              THEN "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close and win the deals."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]           THEN "Underperforming in pipeline generation and deal closing.
"   
END
items.dax: SWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas && pull the team up.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Effective at closing && winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming || hunting).", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close && win the deals.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "Underperforming in pipeline generation && deal closing. ")

items.name: Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)
items.source_formula: [Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034721849348]/[Total Sales (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034722263045]
items.dax: [Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)]/[Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Last N Months - Closed Date)]

items.name: Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)
items.source_formula: SUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)
items.dax: SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))

items.name: Pipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)
items.source_formula: SUM(IF [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] then [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)
items.dax: SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (Star)
items.source_formula:
REPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","★")
+
REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","☆")
items.dax: SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","☆")

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate
items.source_formula:
IF      [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5 then "1" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*2 then "2" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*3 then "3" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*4 then "4" 
ELSE "5"                                    
END
items.dax: IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description)
items.source_formula:
CASE [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816]
WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW"
WHEN "2" THEN "LOW"
WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM"
WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH"
WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH"
END
+ " Average Deal Size"
items.dax: SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Average Deal Size"

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (num)
items.source_formula: int([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816])
items.dax: INT([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size])

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (Star)
items.source_formula:
REPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","★")
+
REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","☆")
items.dax: SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","☆")

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients
